name: momentive/stat-columns
title: Stat Columns
description: A row of statistics, each a large value with a description below. Renders the value verbatim as text (no count-up animation), so any format works — "2,000", "43%", "$1.2M", ">1 million", "24-fold", or a word. For animated single stats with prefix/number/suffix, use momentive/impact-stat instead.
